name: haunt-mcp
description: Adds Haunt MCP web extraction: permitted public URL to clean JSON, Markdown, article fields, metadata, and usage checks.

interface.shortDescription: Extract permitted public pages to JSON or Markdown from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Haunt gives Codex an MCP web-extraction tool for permitted public pages. Use a no-key demo first, then add HAUNT_API_KEY for live URL-to-JSON, Markdown, article, metadata, and usage tools with clear blocked-page errors.
defaultPrompt: Use Haunt to run try_demo_extract and show me the docs and signup links.
